==жИКе≠РгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ0гГї5пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[еЇЪ]]гГї[[дєЩ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[11жЬИ]]гБМжИКе≠РгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгБУгБУгБІгБДгБЖжЬИгБѓгАБ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[е§ІйЫ™]]гБЛгВЙ[[е∞ПеѓТ]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh_min_nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh_yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
<!-- == * Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠ (tsuchinoe-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЛгБЃгБ≠ (boka-no-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧ (boshi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): muja ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 28 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Yang Earth Rat''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
<!-- == * Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠ (tsuchinoe-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЛгБЃгБ≠ (boka-no-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧ (boshi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): muja ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 28 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Yang Earth Rat''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
<!-- == * Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠ (tsuchinoe-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЛгБЃгБ≠ (boka-no-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧ (boshi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): muja ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 28 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Yang Earth Rat''' |- ! AD|ja|2968еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2968 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
<!-- == * Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠ (tsuchinoe-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЛгБЃгБ≠ (boka-no-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧ (boshi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): muja ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 28 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Yang Earth Rat''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
<!-- == * Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠ (tsuchinoe-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЛгБЃгБ≠ (boka-no-ne) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧ (boshi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): muja ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 28 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Yang Earth Rat''' |- ! AD|ja|2968еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2968 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Rat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 28 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Yang Earth Rat''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:V√Ї-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:жИКе≠Р]][[ko:лђімЮР]][[nds:Eer-R√ґtt]][[vi:MбЇ≠u T√љ]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:жИКе≠Р]][[zh:жИКе≠Р]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062052]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Rat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[:en:Rat (zodiac)|Rat (е≠Р)]] of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Sh≈Нkan]]).
==Days of Yang Earth Rat== The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows. === Selected Day === The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is considered the Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Taisetsu}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Sh≈Нkan}}).

==Days of Yang Earth Rat==
The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows.
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧ (boshi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): muja
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is considered the Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Taisetsu}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Sh≈Нkan}}).

==Days of Yang Earth Rat==
The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows.
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is considered the Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Taisetsu}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Sh≈Нkan}}).

==Days of Yang Earth Rat==
The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows.
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is considered the Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Taisetsu}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Sh≈Нkan}}).

'''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)|1=Rat (zodiac)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is considered the Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Taisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Sh≈Нkan|1=Xiaohan}}).

==Days of Yang Earth Rat==
The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows.
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)|1=Rat (zodiac)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=жИКе≠Р|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=w√єz«Р|w=wu-tz≈≠|mi=uвБµвБµ ts…®|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=m…Рu tsi|mc=m…Щu tsi|oc-bs=m…Щ tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Rat''' (жИКе≠Р, гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ≠гАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гБЪгБњгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ≠гАБгБЉгБЧ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)|1=Rat (zodiac)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Rat (жИКе≠Р)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єz«Р
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (лђімЮР)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u T√љ

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is considered the Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Taisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Sh≈Нkan|1=Xiaohan}}).

==Days of Yang Earth Rat==
The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows.
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|дЄБдЇ•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat (е≠Р)|1=Rat (zodiac)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|S≈Нkoku|ja|зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/S≈Нkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is considered the Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Taisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Sh≈Нkan|1=Xiaohan}}).

==Days of Yang Earth Rat==
The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows.
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenp≈Нgure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenp≈Нgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
